intended_use: It is used by radiation oncology department to segment (non-contrast) CT images, to generate needed information for treatment planning, treatment evaluation and treatment adaptation
intended_use_full: It is used by radiation oncology department to segment (non-contrast) CT images, to generate needed information for treatment planning, treatment evaluation and treatment adaptation
ground_truth: Consensus of at least three licensed physicians
other_metrics: DICE Similarity Coefficient (DSC) - device showed non-inferiority compared to predicate device for common organs; additional organs showed non-inferiority compared to other segmented organs in the proposed device
